playbook.intent: Qualified discovery call to scoped proposal + SOW + price, sent within one working day of decision.
playbook.scope: Founder turns a qualified discovery call into a sent proposal. Output: scoped proposal + SOW + price, sent within working day of decision. Exit artifact: signed-or-pending proposal in the deal record.

success-criteria.criterion: Proposal personalized to lead's pain map

stage.name: Scope shaping
stage.intent: Convert pain map into priced outcomes.
stage.decision-gate: Advance with scope on one page + non-goals.

stage.name: Price

tasks.task: Set price against value not hours

stage.decision-gate: Advance when price is defensible without quoting hours.

stage.name: Customize template
stage.intent: Personalize hero, results section, FAQ to this lead.

tasks.task: Adapt hero + summary to lead's words
Drop 2 case studies in same niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance once draft passes 'a stranger could follow this' test.

stage.name: Send + log
stage.intent: Within 24h of discovery verdict; calendar the follow-up.

tasks.task: Log in pipeline with stage + reason

stage.decision-gate: Required: sent within 24h. If late, flag root cause.

extra.value: [Multi-vendor RFP responses - separate workflow, Free 'spec work' proposals - never offered]
[Padding the scope because the proposal feels 'too short', Quoting hours - invites scope creep and locks margin, Sending without an explicit follow-up plan]
['Is the proposal personalized in the lead''s language?', 'Does the price defend itself without hours?', 'Did I send within 24h, or did I drift?']

{human: faion get-content proposal-customization-from-base-template --format md, agent: faion get-content proposal-customization-from-base-template --format context, json: faion get-content proposal-customization-from-base-template --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
